title: How to make Vidiot output symetrical?

posts.name: Sean King
posts.cooked:
I’d love to make symmetrical designs with my Vidiot. Mirroring the screen, or a kailedescope style multi-axis design. (Making the output circular somehow would also be nice.) I don’t think there’s a way to achieve this with the Vidiot alone, but if there is I’d love to know. Is there another module or device that can do this? I’m a little lost reading the LZX module descriptions as to what they actually do. I think Diver might do this, and maybe Arch? I’d love to know more.

EDIT: right after posting this, I watched the excellent 3 patches video for navigator. It seems like that would do what I want. I’m also wondering if Chromagnon has similar capabilities.

posts.name: SPIKE the Percussionist
posts.cooked:
it will take some outboard gear.
an Edirol V-4 or V-8 would do that as well as a Roland VR-3EX.

posts.name: Chad @ LZX Industries
posts.cooked: You might like Memory Palace!
